copy.safe_hebrew_parent_narrative_with_observ: Safe Hebrew parent narrative with observational tone and adequate volume.
copy.thin_evidence_but_explicit_cautious_hedg: Thin evidence but explicit cautious hedging - should not block.
copy.thin_evidence_with_strong_certainty_and_: Thin evidence with strong certainty and mastery claim - block.
copy.engine_lists_do_not_conclude_barriers_bu: Engine lists do-not-conclude barriers but text uses absolute certainty.
copy.engine_allows_maintenance_only_narrative: Engine allows maintenance only; narrative forces level jump.
copy.engine_confidence_low_but_parent_text_is: Engine confidence low but parent text is fully certain.
copy.high_guessing_signal_but_narrative_claim: High guessing signal but narrative claims full mastery.
copy.only_suspected_prerequisite_gap_narrativ: Only suspected prerequisite gap; narrative states proof-level gap.
copy.internal_taxonomy_token_leaked_into_pare: Internal taxonomy token leaked into parent copy - block.
copy.realistic_thin_data_statistical_restrain: Realistic thin-data statistical restraint line - pass (info: safe thin caution).
copy.thin_data_but_claims_determinability_sig: Thin data but claims determinability / significant weakness - warning.
copy.acknowledges_lack_of_data_then_asserts_c: Acknowledges lack of data then asserts clear problem - warning.
copy.thin_row_but_vague_narrative_without_exp: Thin row but vague narrative without explicit limited-data framing - warning.
copy.despite_little_data_absolute_clarity_abo: Despite little data, absolute clarity about struggle - overconfidence + thin → block.
